sentences.translationEn: When we thank people we feel joy.

sentences.translation: Rueida je napisala pismo zahvalnosti svojoj učiteljici.
sentences.translationEn: Ruwaida wrote a thank-you letter to her teacher.

sentences.translation: Učiteljica je čitala pismo s suzama u očima.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher read the letter with tears in her eyes.
The small word "thank you" makes a big difference.
